keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Own Goal by Jeriel Dorsett, Montserrat.  Dominican Republic 1, Montserrat 0.
Goal!  Dominican Republic 2, Montserrat 0. Dorny Romero (Dominican Republic) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal.
First Half ends, Dominican Republic 2, Montserrat 0.
Substitution, Montserrat. Adrian Clifton replaces Lewis Duberry.
Adrian Clifton (Montserrat) Substitution at 46'
Jeriel Dorsett (Montserrat) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jeriel Dorsett (Montserrat) Yellow Card at 50'
